parameters.name: DeviceFilter
parameters.label: Device Name
parameters.description: Optional - substring match on Device Name (leave blank for all)

parameters.name: IPFilter
parameters.label: IP Address
parameters.description: Optional - substring match on any IP (e.g. 10.20. or full IP)

parameters.name: MACFilter
parameters.label: MAC Address
parameters.description: Optional - substring match on MAC Address (e.g. 00-1A or full MAC)

content.json: **Device Discovery**  ·  Inventory summary from `DeviceInfo` with network context from `DeviceNetworkInfo`  ·  KPI tiles follow Time Range and the Device / IP / MAC filters  ·  _Top summary tiles use the same broadened classification (DeviceType + hostname patterns + OSPlatform) as the detail tabs, so totals reconcile across tabs._

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
let _ip = '{IPFilter}';
let _mac = '{MACFilter}';
let Net = DeviceNetworkInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, IPAddresses, MacAddress) by DeviceId
| extend IPs = parse_json(IPAddresses)
| mv-expand IPE = IPs
| extend IP = tostring(IPE.IPAddress)
| summarize IPList = make_set(IP), Mac = take_any(MacAddress) by DeviceId;
let Base = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceType, OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| join kind=leftouter Net on DeviceId
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| where _mac == '' or Mac has _mac
| where _ip == '' or tostring(IPList) has _ip
| extend NameLc = tolower(coalesce(DeviceName,''))
| extend Status = iff(OnboardingStatus =~ 'Onboarded', 'Onboarded', 'Unmanaged')
| extend IsCamera = DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo') or NameLc has_any ('cctv','nvr','dvr','ipcam','hikvision','dahua','axis','vivotek','pelco','arlo','reolink','amcrest')
| extend IsPrinter = DeviceType =~ 'Printer' or NameLc has_any ('printer','prn-','laserjet','officejet','copier','mfp','mfd','xerox','ricoh','konica','kyocera')
| extend IsNetInfra = DeviceType =~ 'NetworkDevice' or NameLc has_any ('router','rtr-','switch','sw-','firewall','fw-','checkpoint','palo','fortinet','juniper','cisco','aruba','ubiquiti','meraki','ruckus','sonicwall','watchguard','netgear','zyxel','mikrotik','access-point','ap-','wap-','wireless','gateway','gw-','load-balancer','lb-','f5-')
| extend IsIoT = DeviceType in~ ('IoTDevice','SmartAppliance','CommunicationsDevice','VoIPPhone','GameConsole','MediaPlayer') or OSPlatform in~ ('IoT','Embedded') or NameLc has_any ('thermostat','hvac','bms','plc','scada','hmi','iot-','sensor','beacon','kiosk','pos-','atm-','vending','badge-reader','intercom')
| extend IsMobile = DeviceType in~ ('MobilePhone','Smartphone','Tablet','Mobile') or OSPlatform in~ ('iOS','iPadOS','Android','AndroidEnterprise')
| extend IsComputerType = DeviceType in~ ('Workstation','Desktop','Laptop','Server')
| extend IsWindowsLikeEndpoint = OSPlatform has_any ('Windows10','Windows11','WindowsServer','macOS','Linux')
| extend IsCameraFinal = IsCamera and not(IsComputerType) and not(IsWindowsLikeEndpoint and not(DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo')))
| extend IsPrinterFinal = IsPrinter and not(IsComputerType)
| extend IsNetInfraFinal = IsNetInfra and not(IsComputerType)
| extend IsIoTFinal = IsIoT and not(IsComputerType)
| extend IsMobileFinal = IsMobile and not(IsComputerType)
| extend IsComputer = IsComputerType or (IsWindowsLikeEndpoint and not(IsCameraFinal or IsPrinterFinal or IsNetInfraFinal or IsIoTFinal or IsMobileFinal));
Base
| where IsComputer or IsNetInfraFinal or IsCameraFinal or IsPrinterFinal or IsIoTFinal or IsMobileFinal
| summarize Total = count(),
            Computers = countif(IsComputer),
            NetworkDevices = countif(IsNetInfraFinal),
            Mobile = countif(IsMobileFinal)
  by Status
| mv-expand kv = pack_array(
    pack('label', strcat(Status, ' - Total'),'value',Total),
    pack('label', strcat(Status, ' - Computers / Servers'),'value',Computers),
    pack('label', strcat(Status, ' - Network Devices'),'value',NetworkDevices),
    pack('label', strcat(Status, ' - Mobile / Tablet'),'value',Mobile))
| project label = tostring(kv.label), value = toreal(kv.value), Status
| order by Status asc, label asc
content.title: Inventory Breakdown - Onboarded vs Unmanaged

content.json: **Network / SSID Inventory** Distinct network names reported in `DeviceNetworkInfo.ConnectedNetworks`, grouped by device category to show where discovered assets are connected.

content.query:
let LastNet = DeviceNetworkInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, ConnectedNetworks) by DeviceId;
let DevTypes = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceType, OnboardingStatus) by DeviceId
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| project DeviceId, DeviceType;
let Rows = LastNet
| join kind=leftouter DevTypes on DeviceId
| mv-expand Net = parse_json(ConnectedNetworks)
| extend NetworkName = tostring(Net.Name)
| where isnotempty(NetworkName)
| extend Category=case(
    DeviceType in~ ('Workstation','Desktop','Laptop'),'Workstation',
    DeviceType=~'Server','Server',
    DeviceType=~'NetworkDevice','Network Device',
    DeviceType=~'Printer','Printer',
    DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo','AudioAndVideo'),'Audio & Video',
    DeviceType in~ ('MobilePhone','Smartphone','Mobile','Mobile','Tablet','Mobile'),'Mobile',
    DeviceType in~ ('IoTDevice','SmartAppliance','CommunicationsDevice','VoIPPhone','GameConsole','MediaPlayer'),'IoT / Smart Device',
    'Unknown')
| summarize DeviceCount=dcount(DeviceId) by NetworkName, Category;
let Totals = Rows | summarize TotalDevices=sum(DeviceCount) by NetworkName;
Rows
| join kind=leftouter Totals on NetworkName
| order by TotalDevices desc, Category asc
| project NetworkName, Category, DeviceCount
content.title: Device Categories per Network / SSID

content.query:
let LastNet = DeviceNetworkInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, ConnectedNetworks) by DeviceId;
let DevTypes = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceType, OnboardingStatus) by DeviceId
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| project DeviceId, DeviceType;
LastNet
| join kind=leftouter DevTypes on DeviceId
| mv-expand Net = parse_json(ConnectedNetworks)
| extend NetworkName = tostring(Net.Name)
| where isnotempty(NetworkName)
| summarize
    TotalDevices   = dcount(DeviceId),
    Workstations   = dcountif(DeviceId, DeviceType in~ ('Workstation','Desktop','Laptop')),
    Servers        = dcountif(DeviceId, DeviceType=~'Server'),
    NetworkDevices = dcountif(DeviceId, DeviceType=~'NetworkDevice'),
    Cameras        = dcountif(DeviceId, DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo','AudioAndVideo')),
    Printers       = dcountif(DeviceId, DeviceType=~'Printer'),
    IoT            = dcountif(DeviceId, DeviceType in~ ('IoTDevice','SmartAppliance','CommunicationsDevice','VoIPPhone','GameConsole','MediaPlayer')),
    Mobile         = dcountif(DeviceId, DeviceType in~ ('MobilePhone','Smartphone','Mobile','Mobile','Tablet','Mobile')),
    Unknown        = dcountif(DeviceId, isempty(DeviceType) or DeviceType=~'Unknown')
    by NetworkName
| order by TotalDevices desc
content.title: Network / SSID Breakdown by Device Type

content.json: **Audio & Video Devices** Includes devices Microsoft Defender XDR classifies as 'AudioAndVideo' (cameras, webcams, video surveillance, AV / conferencing equipment), plus common camera and AV hostnames  ·  Many cameras report `Unsupported` onboarding status, so focus on IP, exposure, and last seen details  ·  Follows the selected Time Range

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceType, OnboardingStatus, OSPlatform) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| extend NameLc = tolower(coalesce(DeviceName,''))
| extend IsByType = DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo')
| extend IsByName = NameLc has_any ('cctv','nvr','dvr','ipcam','hikvision','dahua','axis','vivotek','pelco','bosch-cam','arlo','reolink','amcrest','-cam-','cam-')
| extend IsRegularEndpoint = DeviceType in~ ('Workstation','Server','Desktop','Laptop') or OSPlatform has_any ('Windows10','Windows11','WindowsServer','macOS','Linux')
| where IsByType or (IsByName and not(IsRegularEndpoint))
| summarize TotalCameras=count(), CanBeOnboarded=countif(OnboardingStatus=~'Can be onboarded'), Insufficient=countif(OnboardingStatus=~'Insufficient info' or isempty(OnboardingStatus)), Unsupported=countif(OnboardingStatus=~'Unsupported')
| mv-expand kv=pack_array(pack('label','Unmanaged Audio & Video','value',TotalCameras), pack('label','Can Be Onboarded','value',CanBeOnboarded), pack('label','Insufficient Info','value',Insufficient), pack('label','Unsupported (Expected)','value',Unsupported))
| project label=tostring(kv.label), value=toint(kv.value)
content.title: Unmanaged Audio & Video KPI

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceType, OnboardingStatus, OSPlatform) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
let _ip = '{IPFilter}';
let _mac = '{MACFilter}';
let _Net = DeviceNetworkInfo | where Timestamp {TimeRange} | summarize arg_max(Timestamp, IPAddresses, MacAddress) by DeviceId | mv-expand IPE = parse_json(IPAddresses) | extend IP = tostring(IPE.IPAddress) | where isnotempty(IP) and IP !has ':' and IP !startswith '127.' and IP !startswith '169.254.' | summarize LastIPAddress=take_any(IP), IPList=make_set(IP), Mac=take_any(MacAddress) by DeviceId;
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceType, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, OSPlatform, PublicIP, MachineGroup, ExposureLevel, Vendor, Model) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| join kind=leftouter _Net on DeviceId
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| where _ip == '' or tostring(IPList) has _ip
| where _mac == '' or Mac has _mac
| extend NameLc = tolower(coalesce(DeviceName,''))
| extend IsByType = DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo')
| extend IsByName = NameLc has_any ('cctv','nvr','dvr','ipcam','hikvision','dahua','axis','vivotek','pelco','bosch-cam','arlo','reolink','amcrest','-cam-','cam-')
| extend IsRegularEndpoint = DeviceType in~ ('Workstation','Server','Desktop','Laptop') or OSPlatform has_any ('Windows10','Windows11','WindowsServer','macOS','Linux')
| where IsByType or (IsByName and not(IsRegularEndpoint))
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen=datetime_diff('day',now(),Timestamp)
| extend HealthStatus=iff(DaysSinceLastSeen <= 7, 'Active (<=7d)', iff(DaysSinceLastSeen <= 30, 'Stale (8-30d)', 'Offline (>30d)'))
| project DeviceName, DeviceId, DeviceType, Vendor, Model, OSPlatform, LastIPAddress, MAC=Mac, PublicIP, ExposureLevel, HealthStatus, DaysSinceLastSeen, LastSeen=Timestamp
| order by DaysSinceLastSeen asc, DeviceName asc
| top 1000 by LastSeen desc
content.title: Unmanaged Audio & Video Detail

content.json: **Camera Heartbeat** Onboarding trend, vendor / model census, and observed successful network connections for devices identified as cameras (`DeviceSubtype` contains `camera` or `DeviceType` is an Audio & Video class).  ·  Use this view to validate that newly discovered cameras are coming online, identify camera fleet composition by vendor, and confirm cameras are reachable on the network.  ·  Follows the selected Time Range.

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where (DeviceSubtype has 'camera') or (DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo'))
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| where isnotempty(DeviceId)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(Timestamp) by DeviceId
| summarize NewCameras = count() by Day = startofday(FirstSeen)
| order by Day asc
content.title: New Cameras Discovered Over Time

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where (DeviceSubtype has 'camera') or (DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo'))
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| where isnotempty(Vendor)
| summarize Devices = dcount(DeviceId) by Vendor
| order by Devices desc

content.title: Top Camera Vendors

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
DeviceInfo

| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, Vendor, Model, DeviceSubtype, DeviceType, OnboardingStatus) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| extend Vendor = coalesce(Vendor, 'Unknown'), Model = coalesce(Model, ''), DeviceSubtype = coalesce(DeviceSubtype, '')

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
let CamDevices = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where (DeviceSubtype has 'camera') or (DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo'))
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceName, Vendor, Model, DeviceSubtype, OnboardingStatus) by DeviceId
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded';
let CamNet = DeviceNetworkInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, IPAddresses, ConnectedNetworks) by DeviceId
| join kind=inner CamDevices on DeviceId
| extend FirstIP = tostring(parse_json(IPAddresses)[0].IPAddress)
| extend Network = tostring(parse_json(ConnectedNetworks)[0].Name)
| where isnotempty(FirstIP)
| project DeviceId, CameraIP=FirstIP, DeviceName, DeviceSubtype, Vendor, Model, Network;
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess' and isnotempty(RemoteIP)
| lookup kind=inner CamNet on $left.RemoteIP == $right.CameraIP
| summarize Connections = count(), DistinctClients = dcount(DeviceId), LocalIPs = make_set(LocalIP, 25), Initiators = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10), LastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceName, DeviceSubtype, Vendor, Model, Network, RemoteIP
| order by LastSeen desc, Connections desc
| top 1000 by LastSeen desc
content.title: Observed Successful Connections to Cameras
content.noDataMessage: No successful connections were observed reaching any discovered camera IP within the selected Time Range.

content.json: **Camera Network Activity** Network connection action breakdown, internet-routable camera detection, and outbound traffic from cameras to public destinations.  ·  Cameras that talk to non-RFC1918 destinations (cloud, vendor, public) or sit on public IPs are high-priority review items.  ·  Follows the selected Time Range.

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
let CamIPs = toscalar(DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where (DeviceSubtype has 'camera') or (DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo'))
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| join kind=inner (DeviceNetworkInfo | where Timestamp {TimeRange}) on DeviceId
| mv-expand IPE = parse_json(IPAddresses)
| extend IP = tostring(IPE.IPAddress)
| where isnotempty(IP) and IP !has ':'
| summarize make_set(IP));
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where RemoteIP in (CamIPs) or LocalIP in (CamIPs)
| summarize Count = count() by ActionType
| order by Count desc
content.title: Camera Network Connection Action Breakdown
content.noDataMessage: No DeviceNetworkEvents observed for any camera IP in the selected Time Range.

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
let CamMap = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where (DeviceSubtype has 'camera') or (DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo'))
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceName, Vendor, Model, OnboardingStatus) by DeviceId
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| join kind=inner (DeviceNetworkInfo | where Timestamp {TimeRange}) on DeviceId
| mv-expand IPE = parse_json(IPAddresses)
| extend IP = tostring(IPE.IPAddress)
| where isnotempty(IP) and IP !has ':'
| project CameraIP=IP, DeviceName, Vendor, Model;
CamMap
| extend IsRFC1918 = CameraIP startswith '10.' or CameraIP startswith '192.168.' or (CameraIP startswith '172.' and toint(split(CameraIP,'.')[1]) between (16 .. 31)) or CameraIP startswith '127.' or CameraIP startswith '169.254.'
| where not(IsRFC1918)
| summarize Cameras = make_set(DeviceName, 50), Vendors = make_set(Vendor, 25) by CameraIP
| order by CameraIP asc
content.title: Cameras Reachable on Non-RFC1918 / Public IPs
content.noDataMessage: No cameras were observed on non-RFC1918 / public IP addresses in the selected Time Range.

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
let CamIPs = toscalar(DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where (DeviceSubtype has 'camera') or (DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo'))
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| join kind=inner (DeviceNetworkInfo | where Timestamp {TimeRange}) on DeviceId
| mv-expand IPE = parse_json(IPAddresses)
| extend IP = tostring(IPE.IPAddress)
| where isnotempty(IP) and IP !has ':'
| summarize make_set(IP));
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where LocalIP in (CamIPs)
| extend IsExternal = not(RemoteIP startswith '10.' or RemoteIP startswith '192.168.' or RemoteIP startswith '172.' or RemoteIP startswith '127.' or RemoteIP startswith '169.254.' or RemoteIP has ':')
| where IsExternal
| summarize Connections = count(), Cameras = dcount(LocalIP), Ports = make_set(RemotePort, 20), FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(Timestamp) by RemoteIP, RemoteUrl
| order by Connections desc
| top 100 by Connections desc
content.title: Camera Outbound Traffic to External Destinations (Top 100)
content.noDataMessage: No outbound camera connections to external (non-RFC1918) destinations were observed in the selected Time Range.

content.query:

let CamIPs = toscalar(DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where (DeviceSubtype has 'camera') or (DeviceType in~ ('Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo'))

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
let _ip = '{IPFilter}';
let _mac = '{MACFilter}';
let _Net = DeviceNetworkInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, IPAddresses, MacAddress, ConnectedNetworks, DefaultGateways, DnsAddresses) by DeviceId
| extend IPs = parse_json(IPAddresses)
| mv-expand IPE = IPs
| extend IP = tostring(IPE.IPAddress)
| where isnotempty(IP) and IP !has ':' and IP !startswith '127.' and IP !startswith '169.254.'
| extend FirstNet = parse_json(ConnectedNetworks)[0]
| summarize
    LastIPAddress = take_any(IP),
    IPList = make_set(IP),
    Mac = take_any(MacAddress),
    DefaultGateway = take_any(tostring(parse_json(DefaultGateways)[0])),
    DnsServers = take_any(tostring(DnsAddresses)),
    ConnectedNetworkName = take_any(tostring(FirstNet.Name)),
    DomainAuthenticated = take_any(tostring(FirstNet.DomainAuthenticated))
  by DeviceId;
let _First = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize FirstSeen = min(Timestamp) by DeviceId;
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceType, DeviceSubtype, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState,
    OSPlatform, OSVersion, Vendor, Model, PublicIP, MachineGroup, ExposureLevel)
  by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| join kind=leftouter _Net on DeviceId
| join kind=leftouter _First on DeviceId
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| where _ip == '' or tostring(IPList) has _ip
| where _mac == '' or Mac has _mac
| extend NameLc = tolower(coalesce(DeviceName,''))
| where DeviceType =~ 'NetworkDevice'
| extend SubType = case(NameLc has_any ('firewall','fw-','checkpoint','palo','fortinet','sonicwall','watchguard','asa'),'Firewall', NameLc has_any ('router','rtr-','gateway','gw-'),'Router / Gateway', NameLc has_any ('switch','sw-','core-sw','dist-sw','access-sw'),'Switch', NameLc has_any ('access-point','ap-','wap-','wifi-','wireless','aruba','ubiquiti','ruckus','meraki'),'Wireless / Access Point', NameLc has_any ('load-balancer','lb-','f5-'),'Load Balancer', 'Other Network Device')
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen = datetime_diff('day', now(), Timestamp)
| extend DaysSinceFirstSeen = datetime_diff('day', now(), FirstSeen)
| extend IsPublicIP = isnotempty(PublicIP)
| extend DomainAuthenticated = iff(DomainAuthenticated =~ 'true', 'Yes', iff(DomainAuthenticated =~ 'false', 'No', ''))
| project
    DeviceName, DeviceId, SubType, DeviceType, DeviceSubtype,
    Vendor, Model, OSPlatform, OSVersion,
    LastIPAddress, MAC = Mac, DefaultGateway, DnsServers,
    ConnectedNetworkName, DomainAuthenticated, IsPublicIP, PublicIP,
    ExposureLevel,
    DaysSinceFirstSeen, FirstSeen, DaysSinceLastSeen, LastSeen = Timestamp
| order by ExposureLevel desc, DaysSinceLastSeen asc, DeviceName asc
| top 1000 by LastSeen desc

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
let LastNet = DeviceNetworkInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, ConnectedNetworks, IPAddresses) by DeviceId;
let DevAll = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceType, OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus, Vendor) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| extend NameLc = tolower(coalesce(DeviceName,''))
| where DeviceType =~ 'NetworkDevice'
| extend SubType = case(NameLc has_any ('firewall','fw-','checkpoint','palo','fortinet','sonicwall','watchguard','asa'),'Firewall', NameLc has_any ('router','rtr-','gateway','gw-'),'Router / Gateway', NameLc has_any ('switch','sw-','core-sw','dist-sw','access-sw'),'Switch', NameLc has_any ('access-point','ap-','wap-','wifi-','wireless','aruba','ubiquiti','ruckus','meraki'),'Wireless / Access Point', NameLc has_any ('load-balancer','lb-','f5-'),'Load Balancer', 'Other Network Device')
| extend IsUnmanaged = isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| project DeviceId, DeviceName, DeviceType, SubType, Vendor, OnboardingStatus, IsUnmanaged;
let UnmgdSet = DevAll | where IsUnmanaged | summarize make_set(DeviceId);
LastNet
| join kind=inner DevAll on DeviceId
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| where IsUnmanaged
| mv-expand Net = parse_json(ConnectedNetworks)
| extend NetworkName = tostring(Net.Name),
         NetDomainAuth = tostring(Net.DomainAuthenticated),
         NetCategory = tostring(Net.Category),
         NetDescription = tostring(Net.Description)
| where isnotempty(NetworkName)
| mv-expand IPE = parse_json(IPAddresses)
| extend IP = tostring(IPE.IPAddress), Subnet = tostring(IPE.SubnetAddress)
| where isnotempty(IP) and IP !has ':' and IP !startswith '127.' and IP !startswith '169.254.'
| extend IsPrivate = IP startswith '10.' or IP startswith '192.168.' or IP startswith '172.'
| extend Subnet24 = strcat(tostring(split(IP,'.')[0]),'.',tostring(split(IP,'.')[1]),'.',tostring(split(IP,'.')[2]),'.0/24')
| summarize
    UnmanagedDevices = dcount(DeviceId),
    Firewall = dcountif(DeviceId, SubType=='Firewall'),
    Router = dcountif(DeviceId, SubType=='Router / Gateway'),
    Switch = dcountif(DeviceId, SubType=='Switch'),
    Wireless = dcountif(DeviceId, SubType=='Wireless / Access Point'),
    LoadBalancer = dcountif(DeviceId, SubType=='Load Balancer'),
    Other = dcountif(DeviceId, SubType=='Other Network Device'),
    DistinctSubnets = dcount(Subnet24),
    PublicIPCount = dcountif(IP, not(IsPrivate)),
    DomainAuthenticated = countif(NetDomainAuth =~ 'true'),
    NetworkCategory = take_any(NetCategory),
    TopVendor = take_any(Vendor),
    FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
    LastSeen = max(Timestamp)
  by NetworkName
| extend DomainAuthenticated = iff(DomainAuthenticated > 0, 'Yes', 'No')
| order by UnmanagedDevices desc
| top 1000 by UnmanagedDevices desc

content.query:
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
let Base = DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceType, OnboardingStatus, OSPlatform, ExposureLevel, Vendor, Model) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| where isempty(OnboardingStatus) or OnboardingStatus !~ 'Onboarded'
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| extend NameLc = tolower(coalesce(DeviceName,''))
| extend IsByType = DeviceType in~ ('IoTDevice','SmartAppliance','CommunicationsDevice','VoIPPhone','GameConsole','MediaPlayer') or OSPlatform in~ ('IoT','Embedded')
| extend IsByName = NameLc has_any ('thermostat','hvac','bms','plc','scada','hmi','iot-','sensor','beacon','kiosk','pos-','atm-','vending','access-ctrl','badge-reader','intercom')
| extend IsRegularEndpoint = DeviceType in~ ('Workstation','Server','Desktop','Laptop') or OSPlatform has_any ('Windows10','Windows11','WindowsServer','macOS','Linux')
| where IsByType or (IsByName and not(IsRegularEndpoint));
let _Net = DeviceNetworkInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, IPAddresses, MacAddress) by DeviceId
| mv-expand IPE = parse_json(IPAddresses)
| extend IP = tostring(IPE.IPAddress)
| where isnotempty(IP) and IP !has ':' and IP !startswith '127.' and IP !startswith '169.254.'
       and IP !startswith '10.'
       and not(IP startswith '172.' and toint(split(IP,'.')[1]) between (16 .. 31))
       and IP !startswith '192.168.'
| summarize PublicIPs = make_set(IP, 5), MAC = take_any(MacAddress) by DeviceId;
Base
| join kind=inner _Net on DeviceId
| extend DaysSinceLastSeen = datetime_diff('day', now(), Timestamp)
| extend PublicIP = tostring(PublicIPs[0])
| project DeviceName, DeviceId, DeviceType, Vendor, Model, OSPlatform, PublicIP, AllPublicIPs = PublicIPs, MAC, ExposureLevel, DaysSinceLastSeen, LastSeen = Timestamp
| order by DaysSinceLastSeen asc, DeviceName asc
| top 100 by LastSeen desc

content.query:
// Distinct device counts within the selected time range (Onboarded vs Unmanaged, Workstation vs Server)
let _df = '{DeviceFilter}';
DeviceInfo
| where Timestamp {TimeRange}
| where DeviceType in~ ('Workstation','Desktop','Laptop','Server') or (OSPlatform has_any ('Windows','Linux','macOS') and DeviceType !in~ ('NetworkDevice','Printer','Camera','Webcam','AudioVideoEquipment','VideoSurveillance','AudioAndVideo','IoTDevice','SmartAppliance','CommunicationsDevice','VoIPPhone','GameConsole','MediaPlayer','MobilePhone','Smartphone','Tablet','Mobile'))
| where _df == '' or DeviceName has _df
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, DeviceType, OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus) by DeviceId
| extend Kind = case(OSPlatform has 'WindowsServer' or OSPlatform has 'Server' or DeviceType =~ 'Server', 'Server', 'Workstation')
| extend Onb = OnboardingStatus =~ 'Onboarded'
| summarize
    OnbWS = dcountif(DeviceId, Onb and Kind == 'Workstation'),
    OnbSrv = dcountif(DeviceId, Onb and Kind == 'Server'),
    UnmWS = dcountif(DeviceId, not(Onb) and Kind == 'Workstation'),
    UnmSrv = dcountif(DeviceId, not(Onb) and Kind == 'Server')
| mv-expand kv = pack_array(
    pack('label','Onboarded - Workstations','value',OnbWS),
    pack('label','Onboarded - Servers','value',OnbSrv),
    pack('label','Unmanaged - Workstations','value',UnmWS),
    pack('label','Unmanaged - Servers','value',UnmSrv))
| project label = tostring(kv.label), value = toint(kv.value)
